scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
benefit: 100 days of guaranteed unskilled wage employment per household per year. Wage rate varies by state (₹200–₹350/day approx).
notes: MGNREGA is a demand-driven scheme. Any adult in a rural household can apply. The Act itself is the primary source — very explicit.

conditions.source: MGNREGA Section 2(f) — 'household means the members of a family residing together and those members who normally reside together and include adult members'
conditions.ambiguity_note: Census towns reclassified as urban may still have rural registrations. Peri-urban areas disputed.

conditions.source: MGNREGA Section 2(a) — 'adult means a person who has completed his eighteenth year of age'

conditions.description: Must be willing to do unskilled manual work

conditions.source: MGNREGA Section 3 — applicant must be 'willing to do unskilled manual work'
Assumed willing — any adult rural resident requesting MGNREGA work is by definition willing

conditions.description: Job Card — first-time applicants apply simultaneously

conditions.source: First-time applicants apply for Job Card simultaneously — not a blocker at eligibility stage

exclusions.source: MGNREGA applies only to rural India as defined by the Gram Panchayat jurisdiction
